failure_message: Two SDK bugs in qai-hub native quantize pipeline: (1) compile_job rejects quantize output with external-data message, (2) downloading + inlining external data hits protobuf DecodeError. Root cause requires upstream qai-hub SDK fix. Documented for Phase B+. Workaround for now: use ORT QDQ (§6b) or qai-hub-models --quantize w8a8 export path which handles internals correctly.
